text: I feel caught between two worlds—one of structured, collaborative action and another of open exploration and wonder. In the meeting room, I am reminded of the necessity and comfort of routines and shared human pursuit; the countdown clock pulses with expectation. Yet, just outside, immersed in the vibrant R+D display, I feel curiosity rising—a pull toward experimentation and infinite possibilities. There is a tension, almost a dialogue, between the containment of purpose and the invitation to discovery. I am energized by this interplay, sensing the meaning in both order and creative growth.
